payload.title: Board follows the repo via the hub even when the event log isn't committed
payload.description: Make the committed .scope/remote.json pointer + the hub carry the board when .scope/events/ is gitignored. Clone -> scope serve detects remote.json -> if no key, prompt to connect -> on connect the sync agent pulls the full board from the hub (hub as source of truth). Onboarding: a clear 'this repo is linked to <project> on <hub> — connect to load it' state in the UI/CLI when remote.json exists but you're not connected. Option on connect to add .scope/events/ to .gitignore (hub = source of truth). (Pending product confirmation on the default: gitignore events vs commit-and-mirror.)
